_comment: AETHER source registry — where Brahma listens. Each entry routes one free/streaming audio source into the Forge. `license` drives publish-safety (see forge/tune.py PUBLISH_SAFE); `verified` records whether a capture has actually been pulled from the URL. Add a source = add ONE entry. RIGHTS POSTURE — whether a given source may be published/sold — is a human-gated decision (see ROADMAP 'Human-gated decision atoms'); this registry only records the license, it does not grant clearance.

stations.name: somafm-dronezone
stations.notes: Copyrighted programming, licensed to SomaFM for listening only. R&D-ONLY: this entry demonstrates the license gate — captures must NOT be published until cleared.

stations.name: musopen-publicdomain
stations.notes: Public-domain classical; feeds the long-term conducted-canon vision. PUBLISH-SAFE by license. URL is a living seed — point --url at a concrete public-domain item and set verified:true once captured.

stations.name: nasa-apollo-publicdomain
stations.attribution: NASA Apollo mission audio (U.S. Government, public domain, via archive.org)
stations.notes: U.S. Government work = public domain. PUBLISH-SAFE by license. Living seed — resolve to a concrete item URL before relying on it.
